recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.

recommendations.title: The Last Man on Earth
recommendations.overview: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

recommendations.title: White Fang 2: Myth of the White Wolf
recommendations.overview: A boy and his dog, White Fang, must try to save the noble Haida tribe from evil white men in turn-of-the-century Alaska.

recommendations.title: The Strays
recommendations.overview: A Black woman's meticulously crafted life of privilege starts to unravel when two strangers show up in her quaint suburban town.

recommendations.title: Carrie
recommendations.overview: Withdrawn and sensitive teenager Carrie White faces bullying from classmates and abuse from her fanatically pious mother. When she begins to suspect that she has supernatural powers, things take a dark and violent turn.

recommendations.title: Blancanieves
recommendations.overview: A black and white silent movie, based on the Snow White fairy tale, that is set in a romantic version of 1920s Seville and centered on a female bullfighter.

recommendations.title: The Boy Behind the Door
recommendations.overview: Bobby tries to save himself and his best friend when they are kidnapped on their way home from school.

recommendations.title: Ghosts of War
recommendations.overview: A group of World War II American soldiers encounter a supernatural enemy as they occupy a French castle previously under Nazi control.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor
recommendations.overview: Orbiting a quiet backwater planet, the massed forces of the universe's deadliest species gather, drawn to a mysterious message that echoes out to the stars. And amongst them, the Doctor. Rescuing Clara from a family Christmas dinner, the Time Lord an

recommendations.title: Invaders from Mars
recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.
